apps.title: Last Beacon: Survival
apps.summary:
This is a post-apocalyptic ocean survival game where you will experience thrilling and innovative adventures and challenges!

As sea levels continue to rise, the world has been completely submerged. Humanity can only struggle to survive on scattered shelters drifting across the vast ocean.

As the leader of the survivors, you must guide your people to search for supplies, build shelters, develop technology, repel invaders, and ultimately survive in this endless sea.

Your leadership will determine success or failure.
In this new era, endless possibilities await!

[Core Gameplay]

Build Ocean Shelters
Construct and upgrade shelters at sea, gather and produce resources, and strengthen your base defenses.

Exploration & Combat
Dispatch fleets to explore unknown waters, uncover lost civilizations, and face unexpected battles at any moment.

Alliances & Sea Dominance
Join or create alliances, occupy sea fortresses, and compete for control of global ocean territories.

Deep-Sea Crises
Survive sudden disasters, colossal sea monsters, and ruthless pirates threatening your existence.

apps.title: Shadowborn
apps.summary:
Shadowborn is an arcade-style RPG designed for fast, gripping mobile gameplay. Dive into a rich world of whimsy and darkness letting you carve your path to victory, whether it's a quick battle or a longer, more immersive quest.

Experience pure power fantasy with tight, short game loops that pack in excitement. Move seamlessly through vibrant landscapes, tackle fast-paced missions, and engage in combat that's responsive and satisfying. The game rewards your skill, allowing you to dodge attacks and time your take-downs to win against the odds.


UNLEASH YOUR POWER
Step into a world of fantasy as a hero uniquely tailored to your style:
• Select from distinctive classes like the Warrior, Rogue, Sorcerer, Necromancer, Swashbuckler, and Valkyrie — each with a unique feel and powerful abilities.
• Experiment with a multi-class system allowing you blend abilities from different achetypes and create a truly unique warrior.
• Explore the different skill trees to unlock powerful synergies and legendary skills, making every playthrough unique.

SECRETS EVERYWHERE
The world is filled with hidden discoveries waiting to be found:
• Pull the legendary Sword in the Stone, unlock sliding bookcases, and walk the Path of Fire.
• Solve the Weeping Angel puzzle, discover what waits for you beyond the Looking Glass.
• Find the Veiled Temples, Pirate Caves, and the horrors of the Baron's Laboratory.
• Track your progress - the map shows how many secrets remain in each area.

DARK AND WHIMSICAL WORLD
Encounter a world of contrasts, where light and darkness dance:
• Explore haunted graveyards, abandoned churches, eerie swamps, mysterious lagoons, treacherous pirate caves, and ancient mines.
• Face the darkness: battle skeletal hordes, giant spiders, oozing slimes, fire elementals, spectral wraiths, and carnivorous plants.
• Confront epic bosses like the Brood Mother, Lich Lord, Pirate Captain, and the mysterious Baron von Darkwood.
• Discover serene moments with unicorns in sunlit glades and mermaids offering riddles by moonlit waterfalls.

ARCADE-INSPIRED COMBAT
Feel the thrill of smooth, responsive controls that adapt to your style:
• Choose between arcade and dual-stick control options for a flexible experience that feels great in your hands.
• Engage in satisfying, responsive combat that makes every fight feel impactful, like an arcade brawler in a fantasy world.
• Hire mercenaries to fight alongside you, raise the dead as a Necromancer, or ride into battle on horseback.

ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY
Your journey doesn't end at victory:
• Unlock heirlooms and a retirement system, encouraging fresh playthroughs and new challenges.
• Choose from many side quests: Solve mermaid riddles, explore the Sunken Citadel, and piece together the secrets of the mysterious Esmeralda
• Power up with new gear, refined strategies, and complete achievements

READY FOR ANY PLAYTIME
Quick missions that deliver big on action:
• 3-4 minute loops offer bite-sized, high-energy action perfect for mobile.
• Each mission drops you instantly into the heart of the action, keeping every session short and intense.

Embrace the whimsy and darkness of Shadowborn — an arcade RPG crafted for mobile players who crave fast-paced action in a world as enchanting as it is deadly. Download now and begin your journey!

apps.title: Quiz Blitz: Test Brain Game
apps.developer: Quiz & Trivia Games by Mno Go Apps
apps.summary:
Welcome to Quiz Blitz - A Puzzle & Trivia Challenge for Curious Minds

Dive into Quiz Blitz, a one-of-a-kind puzzle quiz game where every question is a chance to unlock brain-teasing challenges, discover amazing facts, and train your logic skills through smart, interactive gameplay.

Quiz Blitz offers a fresh, puzzle-first take on traditional trivia games. Explore a wide range of topics - like music, animals, geography, science, art, and pop culture - brought to life through image-based puzzles, logic riddles, and satisfying “aha!” moments. This isn’t just another trivia app. It’s a puzzle journey, a brain training experience, and an IQ challenge designed for thinkers and explorers.

What Makes Quiz Blitz a Great Puzzle Game?

- Visual logic puzzles: Identify icons, objects, faces, animals, and places using visual clues

- Interactive gameplay: Swipe, tap, drag, and solve challenging logic-based quiz tasks

- Topic-based puzzle levels: Unlock themed packs—music, geography, science, art and more

- Flexible difficulty: Choose your pace—relax with casual play or complete 100% for a challenge

- Brain-friendly design: Ideal for adults, families, and curious puzzle lovers of all ages

- Smart progression: Earn stars, unlock achievements, and grow your puzzle-solving skills

Built for Puzzle & Trivia Fans Who Want More!

If you enjoy puzzle games, visual riddles, logic challenges, or trivia apps that engage your brain, Quiz Blitz is made for you. It blends thoughtful design with rewarding gameplay, offering a clean and fun experience you can enjoy anytime. Whether you're a trivia buff, a puzzle pro, or just love solving things, there’s always something new to discover.

Your next puzzle journey is just a tap away.

Challenge your brain. Solve with style. Welcome to Quiz Blitz.

apps.title: Police Chief
apps.summary:
The world is shrouded in crime. Cities teem with gangs, drug cartels, and assassin syndicates — citizens live in fear. As the newly appointed police chief, you must start small and strategically expand a local precinct while safeguarding the city. Grow your reputation step by step: expand office space, establish new departments, streamline paperwork, recruit elite officers, and equip your team with top-tier gear to tackle increasingly complex cases. Transform a modest station into a prestigious law enforcement headquarters!

1. Design & Build Your Police HQ
Build an empire of justice from the ground up! Freely arrange facilities such as interrogation rooms, holding cells, and armories to optimize investigations. Every brick you lay brings the city closer to order.

2. Recruit Officers & Upgrade Gear
Assemble a dream team of elite officers to dismantle criminal schemes. Invest resources in advanced weaponry and vehicles to handle escalating threats.

3. Investigate Cases Strategically
Intimidation or incentives? Choose interrogation strategies and adapt your approach to each suspect. As your caseload grows, you’ll face off against notorious criminals and deploy SWAT teams to bring them to justice!

4. Manage Inmates
More inmates mean more federal funding, but they also require meticulous oversight. Classify inmates by risk level, assign them to segregated housing, and maintain vigilant patrols to prevent jailbreaks.

5. Crush Prison Riots
Poor meals, cramped cells, or lax surveillance can spark violent uprisings. Mobilize rapid-response teams in riot gear to suppress them before they tank your reputation and funding!

Key Features:

Strategic Depth: Balance budget, reputation, and security in a dynamic crime ecosystem.
Progression System: Evolve from a rundown precinct to a high-tech law enforcement center.
Realistic Challenges: Adapt to gang wars, hostage crises, and corruption scandals.
Can you bring the streets back from the brink? The city’s fate rests in your hands.

apps.title: Medal Hunter: Military Game
apps.summary:
Step into the battlefield in Medal Hunter, a fast-paced shooting game experience where precision, timing, and skill determine every victory. In this intense combat shooting world, you operate powerful military weapons positioned across dangerous warzones, tasked with intercepting enemy forces approaching from the air, sea, and land. Every encounter demands focus. Success belongs to players who can track targets, anticipate movement, and fire at exactly the right moment. The intensity of the front lines is brought to life through stylized, attractive visuals and cinematic audio effects that make every explosion and engine roar feel visceral.

Medal Hunter places you behind specialized war shooting weapons designed to stop incoming enemy units before they escape. Fighter planes streak across the sky, naval vessels cut through open water, and armored vehicles advance across the ground in the middle of large-scale battles. Your role is to stay calm under pressure, follow the movement of each target, and release a perfectly timed shot that turns the tide of battle.

For those seeking competition, Medal Hunter brings intense one-on-one PvP battles against players from around the world in competitive shooting encounters. Battles unfold in fast three-round matches where every decision counts. Victory doesn’t depend on luck or random mechanics — it comes down to skillful shooting accuracy, sharp reflexes, and tactical judgment. In these quick competitive duels, the player who tracks targets more precisely and demonstrates superior shooting skills claims the win.

As you progress, you’ll unlock a powerful arsenal of specialized war weapons built for different combat shooting scenarios. Explosive Flak Cannons tear through incoming aircraft with devastating blasts. Advanced naval cannons/guns are designed to intercept naval targets moving across open water. Precision Guns allow you to eliminate ground vehicles and armored units with deadly accuracy. Each weapon can be upgraded to increase its damage, bullet speed, rate of fire, and overall war shooting power. The more you develop your arsenal, the more dominant your battlefield performance becomes.

Your battles will take place across diverse war operations inspired by different theaters of conflict: Warsaw, Gibraltar, Pearl Harbor and more. Each location introduces new challenges and enemy types, from fast fighter jets and massive naval vessels to tanks and armored vehicles. Every battlefield demands a different tactical approach, forcing you to adapt your weapon choices and shooting tactics to survive the chaos of war.

Gain a tactical edge by equipping a Gunner—a consumable specialist that grants powerful, fixed passive stat boosts to your weapons for the duration of any battle.

Players can also join Clubs to fight alongside other sharpshooters and take part in cooperative war missions. Club members work together in special Club Boss battles, where the entire group attempts to defeat a powerful enemy target. Victory depends on the combined performance of the whole club — every accurate shooting strike brings the team closer to destroying the boss and claiming the reward.

Climb the competitive war leagues and prove yourself against players worldwide. With every victory you collect medals, advance through the ranks, and move closer to becoming a true master of precision combat. You can showcase your trophies in Soldier's Haven - your private Trophy Room. Only the most skilled war shooters will earn the title of Medal Hunter.

The journey to the top is paved with constant progression; as you play, you will unlock new exotic locations, earn exclusive rewards, and gather rare collectibles to complete the Haven. Every milestone allows you to get challenging achievements and level up your profile to show the world your veteran status.

Take your position.
Track the target.
Fire the perfect shot.

Download Medal Hunter and enter the ultimate shooting battlefield.

apps.summary:
Become the ultimate invisible predator in the most realistic sniper game!

As an elite ghost sniper, you are deployed into high-stakes missions across the globe. Experience intense 3D gun shooter action that demands tactical mastery and a steady hand in the heat of a total war strike.

🌍 Global Battlefields & Tactical Missions
This is not just another shooting gallery. Our action war game takes you to the world’s deadliest conflict zones:
• The Middle East (Iraq & Afghanistan): Engage targets in dusty urban labyrinths and guard strategic outposts in vast desert landscapes.
• Eastern Europe: Navigate the chilling atmosphere of abandoned cities and desolate industrial ruins.
• Africa: Neutralize threats across wide-open savannas and volatile border crossings.
• South & Central American Jungles: Hunt down guerilla insurgents in dense tropical foliage where every shadow hides a secret.

• Offline Shooter: No internet? No problem. Enjoy the full campaign anytime, anywhere.

• Free to Play: Experience the complete war game experience for free.

Join the ranks of the world's most elite marksmen. Download Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter now and prove you are the best shot in the business.

One shot, one kill. Leave no trace.

apps.title: Rhythm Tiles：Pop Songs
apps.summary:
🚀 Step into the neon future of Rhythm Games and enjoy cyber music piano！
Are you ready to test your reflexes and become a true piano master? Welcome to Rhythm Tiles, the most immersive and visually stunning cyber music experience on mobile! If you are a fan of piano games, rhythm games, and high-octane music games, you’ve just found your next obsession.
This isn't just another casual piano game; it’s a high-speed journey through a digital universe where every tap creates a symphony. Whether you're a fan of Kpop games, EDM, or classic pop, Rhythm Tiles brings the beat to your fingertips in a way you've never felt before.

---
🕹️ How to Play: Tap, Slide, and Conquer the Beat!
Rhythm Tiles is designed to be intuitive for beginners but offers a legendary challenge for rhythm game pros.
1. Watch the Screen: As the rhythm tiles fall from the top in a sleek cyber interface, get your fingers ready!
2. Tap the Tiles: Tap the black or colored tiles exactly as they hit the rhythm line.
3. Hold & Slide: For long notes, press and hold to sustain the melody.
4. Precision is Key: Don't miss a tile! Missing even one will break your combo and end your run.
5. Boost Your Score: Collect glowing balls and golds on the track to trigger "Fever Mode" and double your points!

---
🔥 Why Rhythm Tiles is the Ultimate Music Game?
🎶 A Massive, Ever-Growing Song Library
From the latest chart-topping Kpop hits to pulse-pounding EDM and classic piano masterpieces, our song games library is updated weekly. No matter your taste, you’ll find the perfect beat to play along to.
🌌 Stunning Cyberpunk Visuals
Escape into a world of neon lights and futuristic aesthetics. Our cyber theme transforms every piano game session into a visual feast, with dynamic backgrounds that react to your performance.
📶 No Wifi? No Problem! (Offline Games)
Searching for no wifi games? We’ve got you covered. Enjoy the full rhythm game experience anywhere—on a plane, the subway, or in the middle of nowhere. Rhythm Tiles is one of the premier offline games for music lovers.
🏆 Compete and Unlock
Unlock unique skins for your tiles and even different "sound fonts." Want your piano to sound like a digital synth or a classic grand? The choice is yours. Collect balls of light to unlock secret "Hardcore" versions of your favorite tracks.

---
⭐ Key Features ⭐
Free Games Excellence: Download and play for free! Experience high-quality music games content without a price tag.
Piano Games Perfection: Smooth, responsive tap mechanics that make you feel like a real piano master.
Kpop Games Mode: Dedicated playlists featuring the hottest Kpop music and idols.
Rhythm & Beat Mastery: Test your hand-eye coordination with various difficulty levels, from "Chill" to "Cyber Legend."
Fun Games for Everyone: A fun game that’s easy to pick up for kids, yet deep enough for adults and pro gamers.
Small Footprint: Optimized to run smoothly on all devices while maintaining high-fidelity audio.
No Wifi Games: Fully functional offline games support for on-the-go entertainment.
Interactive Effects: Watch the balls and sparks fly with every perfect tap on the tiles.

---
👑 Become a Rhythm Legend
Stop just listening to music and start playing it! Rhythm Tiles combines the addictive nature of tile tapping with the soul of a professional piano game. Improve your timing, challenge your friends on the global leaderboards, and see if you have the speed to handle the fastest rhythm games on the market.
Ready to drop the beat?
👉 Download Rhythm Tiles for FREE today and let your cyber journey begin!

apps.title: Don't Exfil Late
apps.summary:
Midnight isn't a time; it's a death sentence. The world has been redacted, rubbed out by a cosmic eraser, leaving only a sketch of a nightmare. You are a Dread-Hunter, a soul brave (or greedy) enough to step into the ink-stained ruins of hospitals and schools to reclaim what was lost. But the architecture here is alive, and it’s starving.
The clock is melting. If the chime hits twelve and you’re still inside, you don't just die—you become part of the ink.

THE GAMBLE: LOOT. KILL. EXFIL.
The rules of the "Grey" are written in blood: Grab the scrap, banish the haunts, and get to the extraction point.
• Race the Clock: Every second you spend looting is a second closer to permanent erasure.
• High-Stakes Scavenging: From hollowed-out high schools to echoing offices, every drawer could hold a relic... or a trap.
• The Point of No Return: Carry too much, and you’ll slow down. Leave too late, and you lose it all. Greed is a heavy burden—can you carry it?
CRAFT YOUR CURSE: ROGUELIKE EVOLUTION
In this world, you don't just fight the darkness—you consume it. Every ghost you exorcise grants a fragment of its power.
• Instant Mutation: Mid-combat, choose from 3 Twisted Power-Ups. Will you choose a searing spectral light, or a jagged ritual blade?
• Unstoppable Synergies: Combine charms and perks to create a "Build of Ruin." Adapt your strategy on the fly, or become a ghost’s next meal.
RELICS OF THE BEYOND
Build your Arsenal of Nightmares with over 50 unique Talismanic Tools.
• Deep Perk Trees: Every rusted blade and spectral lantern can be forged and upgraded.
• Legendary Loot: Hunt for mythic scrap to transform your basic gear into artifacts of world-ending power.

WHY SURVIVE HERE?
• Eerie Gothic Art: Immerse yourself in a hand-drawn world inspired by classic macabre sketches.
• Bite-Sized Terror: Experience the intensity of hard-core extraction in fast, casual sessions.
• Infinite Variety: Explore 8+ distinct urban environments with dozens of heroes and hundreds of perk combinations.
• The Ultimate Risk: Feel the adrenaline of the final dash to the exit. Will you be the one who escapes, or just another whisper in the hallway?

THE CLOCK IS TICKING. DON'T BE LATE.

Through savvy management and strategic investment, upgrade your facilities and optimize the environment to build your dream community. Master your finances, expand your business footprint, and achieve a double breakthrough in wealth and status amidst the city's tides.
With a deep growth system and diverse mission challenges, you’ll sharpen your Knowledge, Charisma, and Fitness. Break your limits to unlock advanced business strategies and life possibilities. As your success and capabilities soar, you’ll become the brightest star in the city. A peak career and sincere romance are yours to command!

apps.summary:

Flower Forest - Word Puzzle is a relaxing puzzle game and point-and-click puzzle adventure where you explore mysterious spaces, interact with hidden objects, and combine them to uncover clever solutions.

No words. No voice. Just pure intuition.

Each level is designed as a brain teaser that can be solved through logic and observation — no complex calculations, no note-taking. Discover hidden clues, connect objects, and unlock new areas in this calming mystery puzzle game.

apps.title: NTE: Neverness to Everness
apps.summary:
NTE is a supernatural open-world RPG developed by Hotta Studio. The story begins in the city of Hethereau, where you play as its first "unlicensed" Anomaly Hunter. You'll join the crew at Eibon, a rundown antique shop that keeps the lights on by taking Anomaly commissions from anyone willing to pay. Alongside a diverse cast of extraordinary companions, you'll unravel urban mysteries, ride out adventures full of laughs and heartbreak, and write your own stories in the neon-lit streets.

◆ Strange City, Strange Adventures

Welcome to the first stop in your appraisal career—Hethereau, a sprawling and vibrant metropolis!

In the crowded halls of the Bureau of Anomaly Control, hopeful Oddities queue up for resident permits, while over at the train station, an Esper commuter snaps his fingers to clean his work suit on the fly. Down one block, a chaotic chase after Danzaburou is spiraling out of control; while across the street, a vacationing silver-gloved Butler is shooting the breeze with the owner of a second-hand electronics shop. Everywhere you look, there's no shortage of intriguingly "abnormal" scenes.

Want to dive deeper into a world where humans and the supernatural coexist? Start your journey in Hethereau to see it for yourself. The lively and quirky daily life here is a grand adventure in itself.

◆ Interesting Stories, Lighthearted Connections

Today's Top Story: Rumors are swirling about a mysterious pawnshop that only appears on the night of the full moon. What would you trade for a wish?

Breaking News: Taygedo's romance crisis! Romance and impulse, heartbreak and missed chances—Miss Tako, the object of a secret crush, is about to leave Hethereau with her guarantor. How will the lovestruck otter get his feelings across before it's too late?

Reliable Insider Tip: Film Orbit Studio is back in business! Members of the Eibon Antique Shop get exclusive discounts!

Weather Update: The Anomaly Rainman is entering an active phase—don't forget your rain gear on the way out!

That wraps up today's 10AM broadcast. Stay tuned for mysterious Anomalies, unbreakable "Oaths," and the ever-growing shadow of the colossal "Circle" organization, looming larger in the fragmented echoes of "Prophecies"...

◆ Encounters and Bonds

Explore hidden shops tucked away in back alleys and meet their enigmatic owners, along with absurdly overpowered bodyguards, "jack-of-all-trades" robotic butlers, troublemakers who can't help finding problems, and TV-headed repairmen with some very curious eating habits.

As part of the Eibon crew, you'll never be short on energetic companions for the road ahead.

Expand your social circle starting from the bustling Hankaku Street! Meet members from different factions and add them as "Bagel" friends!

From the tight-knit neighborhood of street shops to the city's unique hunter organizations, countless side stories await—ready for you to make friends and forge bonds across every corner of Hethereau.

◆ Customize Your Urban Lifestyle

Explore the city on your own terms—stick to familiar routines or shake things up.

Customize your ride and tear through the city streets, or hop on the Ghost Train to cut through Anomaly space and arrive in a flash.

In your downtime, swing by the old shops on Hankaku Street to browse their secret seasonal stock, or buy a cozy little home and deck it out to your liking.

Go at your own pace, follow your instincts, and let Hethereau reward you with colorful days worth remembering.
Follow our official channels for the latest on NTE!
Official Website: https://nte.perfectworld.com
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@NTE_Official
X: https://x.com/NTE_GL
Discord: https://discord.gg/nte

Facebook: https://facebook.com/NTE.Official.Game
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ntegame.official/

apps.title: Fun Mahjong Match
apps.summary:
Dive into a cozy, timeless mahjong matching adventure crafted for casual players and puzzle lovers alike.

Enjoy classic mahjong gameplay with beautifully designed tiles and a warm, inviting art style that feels both familiar and fresh.

Your goal is simple: find and pair matching mahjong tiles to clear intricate boards, beat unique level challenges, and unlock exciting rewards.

Every level brings new layouts, tricky obstacles, and creative twists to keep each round feeling exciting and unpredictable.

Glossy Glass-Like Visuals: Every tile shines with a smooth, polished finish. Fruits, flowers, and everyday objects look vibrant and eye-catching, creating a clean and refreshing visual experience that makes every match more enjoyable.

apps.title: Vita Mahjong Wood
apps.summary:
Vita Mahjong Wood: Classic Wooden Tile Matching, Your Exclusive Relaxing Puzzle Game!
Vita Mahjong Wood is an exclusive classic wooden tile matching puzzle game. We are thrilled to present this mahjong game that combines innovation with classic gameplay. It features warm, wooden large tiles and a user-friendly interface compatible with pads and phones. Our goal is to provide a relaxing yet mentally engaging gaming experience, particularly focused on older adults.
How to Play Vita Mahjong Wood:
Playing the free Vita Mahjong Wood game is simple. Just aim to clear all the tiles on the board by matching tiles with identical images. Tap or slide two matching wooden tiles, and they will vanish from the board. Your objective is to match tiles that are not concealed or blocked. Once all tiles are eliminated, it signifies successful completion of a mahjong game!
Exclusive Vita Mahjong Wood Game Features:
- Classic Wooden Mahjong Experience: Staying true to the original gameplay, it presents traditional wood-grained tile sets and hundreds of boards, offering you the purest classic feel.
- Special Innovations: Besides the classic, our game introduces special tiles that add a fresh twist to traditional mahjong.
- Large-Scale Design: Our mahjong games feature large, easily readable text sizes on comfortable wooden tile surfaces to alleviate the strain caused by small fonts.
- Active Mind Levels: A special mode designed to sharpen your mind and improve memory abilities in the mahjong games.
- Customizable Scoring: You can enjoy free classic mahjong games without a timer and any score pressure.
- Super Combo: When you consecutively match mahjong tiles during the game, you will unlock special experiences.
- Helpful Hints: Our game provides free useful props, such as hints, undo, and shuffle, to help players overcome challenging puzzles.
- Daily Challenge: Take on daily practice to collect trophies and improve your classic mahjong solitaire game skills.
- Offline Mode: Full offline support lets you enjoy Vita Mahjong Wood anytime, anywhere, without needing internet.
- Multi-device: Optimized for pad and phone, ensuring everyone can enjoy this classic mahjong game.
Vita Mahjong Wood is a versatile game made for those who love tile matching games. Download Vita Mahjong Wood and immerse yourself in the serenity and joy of classic wooden mahjong, starting your mahjong dynasty now!
Note: This is a puzzle game in the style of Mahjong Solitaire. It does not contain the rules of traditional Mahjong or other types of solitaire or card games. The term “Mahjong” here refers solely to the visual style of the tiles.

apps.title: Orc Saga
apps.summary:
Orc Saga — an epic idle card RPG where strategy meets savage satisfaction.
In the continent of Tuate, the once-enslaved half-orcs rise to reclaim their destiny. Become their chosen champion, lead a band of humans, elves, and undead, and grow from a hunted outcast into a living legend of the battlefield.

Smart Strategy, Brutal Strength
Every hero brings unique skills and attitudes. Mix and match your lineup, trigger explosive skill combos, and outthink your enemies—because sometimes the sharpest weapon isn’t a blade, but a plan.

Classic Raids, Epic Boss Fights
Take your five core heroes through the Plaguelands, Dragon’s Trial, and more. Relive iconic clashes against Skeleton Lords and Infernal Terrors—this time, you’re the one in charge.

Feasts & Freebies—Play More, Pay Less
“Half-orcs are no one’s slaves… unless you keep us well-fed!” Claim free S+ heroes, enjoy shared leveling, and get more rewards with less grind.
A nearby beast whimpers: “Draw me… I need a friend!”

Brotherhood & Guild Glory
Fight alongside allies, support your guild, and chat through every challenge. Remember: in Tuate, the real treasure is the crew you roll with.
Pro tip from a wise beast: “Stick with the strongest. Survival first!”

Idle & Dominate
You log off, we fight on. You come back, we’ve leveled up. Build overpowered teams that conquer even while you’re away.

Gear up. Gather your crew. The legend starts now.

apps.title: Arrows Puzzle Relax
apps.summary:
🌟 Why choose "Arrows Puzzle Relax"?
Mind Awakening: Challenge logic, planning and spatial perception in the interlacing of arrows - keep your brain active with clever arrow-pulling puzzles.

Immersive decompression: no time limit, no countdown pressure. Develop strategies calmly and enjoy pure thinking in a quiet atmosphere.

Minimalism: The screen design eliminates redundancy and minimizes visual interference, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the art of puzzle solving.

Take Control: Whether it's a quick 5-minute break or a long commute, it fits your pace perfectly.


🌟 Game highlights: intellectual game, tranquility of mind
Craftsmanship levels: Thousands of hand-polished levels, say goodbye to boring random generation - each level is a unique puzzle-solving experience.

Smooth curve: difficulty gradually increases. From easy to get started to deep brain-burning, it accurately matches your thinking growth, making it challenging but not frustrating.

Pure aesthetics: Simple yet high-end design returns the visual focus to the puzzle itself - focusing on solving the puzzle rather than tedious operations.

Zero-pressure experience: You can think over and over again and try multiple times. There is no step penalty, only the exploration of the optimal path.

Turn on at any time: supports offline play, no matter where you are, your private mental gym is always online.

🌟 Core gameplay: minimalist control, in-depth strategy
Core task: Reasonably plan the order of arrow shooting. Make sure every arrow leaves the field smoothly without any collision.

Intuitive operation: Tap the screen to pull the arrow. The operation is extremely simple, but the depth of the strategy behind it is fascinating.

Multidimensional thinking: Who moves first? Who is the queen? How to get around obstacles? Every simple click is a test of forward planning.

Perfect pass: complete the level with zero collisions and zero mistakes, and attack the logic peak of higher difficulty.

🌟 Intimate function: your puzzle solving companion
Smart Tips: Encountering a bottleneck? Use elimination props to eliminate them directly, which is a shortcut to your victory.

apps.summary:
Dive into FateDrill, the ultimate idle mining adventure where every spin of the drill brings you closer to real rewards. Take control of a powerful auto-advancing drill that burrows deep into rich mineral veins. As you dig, you'll harvest two valuable resources: diamonds and cash.

The thrill doesn't stop there — diamonds can be directly exchanged for real money, turning your playtime into tangible earnings.

Boost your mining efficiency by upgrading your drill’s speed and power. The deeper you go, the greater the rewards. Need an extra edge? Spin the lucky wheel to unlock game-changing power-ups like:

Laser – instantly melts through tough rock layers.

Bomb – clears a wide area of minerals in one blast.

Black Hole – sucks in all nearby resources for a massive loot collection.

With incremental progression, exciting bonuses, and the chance to earn real cash, FateDrill combines idle mechanics with high-stakes excitement. Start drilling today and let fate decide your fortune

apps.title: Dungeon Rush
apps.developer: LAVA LABS OYUN YAZILIM VE PAZARLAMA ANONİM ŞİRKETİ
apps.summary:
Become a legend in the ultimate idle RPG adventure. Conquer relentless enemies, collect legendary loot, and master epic skills in this endless dungeon crawler!

⚔️ Endless Progression and Idle Combat
Delve into an infinite dungeon and face increasingly difficult waves of enemies. Your hero fights automatically in this thrilling auto-battler, slaying enemies to earn gold and drop valuable loot chests. Whether you are actively managing your inventory or letting the game run, the incremental progression ensures your character is always growing stronger.

💰 AFK Offline Rewards
The adventure never stops. Collect massive rewards even when you are away from your screen. Your hero continues to clear dungeons and hoard treasure while you are idle. Return to a full stash of AFK rewards, chests, and gold, ready to be opened for your next massive power spike.

🚀 Evolve from Medieval to Sci-Fi
Experience a unique equipment progression system. Begin your journey with basic medieval gear and bare fists, and evolve your arsenal into high-tech sci-fi weaponry, including advanced laser guns. As your power level increases, so does the technology of your equipment and the strength of your enemies. Spend your hard-earned gold to upgrade your loot drop chances, ensuring you pull the rarest legendary items from your chests.

🐉 Epic Boss Fights and Special Dungeons
Test your ultimate build in special dungeons designed to push your limits. Battle against unique and challenging bosses, ranging from massive dragons to overwhelming zombie hordes. Defeating these formidable monsters rewards you with premium loot boxes and rare Skill Scrolls.

✨ Master Devastating Skills
Use your gathered Skill Scrolls to unlock and upgrade a vast arsenal of active abilities. Master area-of-effect bombs, powerful magical buffs, and lethal spinning blades. Strategize and upgrade your skills to best your opponents and conquer the deepest levels of the dungeon.

⭐ Key Features:
Unstoppable Idle RPG Action: Progress endlessly and farm resources, even while offline.
Deep Loot System: Open chests to discover gear spanning from medieval fantasy to sci-fi tech.
Incremental Upgrades: Spend in-game gold to permanently boost your legendary drop rates.
Special Boss Dungeons: Farm unique monster encounters for Skill Scrolls and exclusive rewards.
Dynamic Combat Skills: Equip and upgrade bombs, buffs, and blades to customize your auto-battler strategy.

apps.title: Last Asylum: Plague
apps.summary:
One sanctuary. One doctor. One last chance.
A mysterious plague has swept across the world, leaving chaos in its wake. As a plague doctor, you become the town's final beacon of hope. Build and manage a sanctuary, heal those you can, and guide your people through the darkest days of the pandemic. Your strategy will shape their future.

[The Sanctuary of Hope]
Run your sanctuary as the last refuge against the plague.
Treat patients, craft herbal remedies, and expand your wards to shelter the growing tide of the sick and desperate.

[Counter the Rat Swarm]
Hold the last line against the Rat Swarm.
Recruit and upgrade your heroes. Build as many defensive towers as you can. Slay the Rat King to repel the swarm.

[Gather Resources, Rebuild the Town]
Dispatch survivors to gather resources and secure outposts in the wild.
Collect timber, herbs, food, and other essential supplies. Construct production facilities, expand warehouses, and upgrade residential buildings to house more survivors.

[Seize Abandoned Ruins]
Form elite squads of heroes to reclaim plague-ridden towns.
Create the best lineup of different types of heroes. Outsmart contenders on the battlefield. Gain control of crucial cities. Expand your territory in this world.

apps.title: Dream Raiders 2: Wilds
apps.summary:
Ready to begin a relaxing idle adventure in another world?
Wait—what?! You’ve been reincarnated as an adorable pet?! Become a mysterious (and irresistibly fluffy) hero in a whimsical fantasy realm, and start your cozy adventure across Dreamland. Set up camp, soak up the sunlight, share drinks, and enjoy a sizzling barbecue with friends—what could be better?

【Effortless Idling, Endless Rewards】
Wake up from a sweet dream—huh? Why is the warehouse overflowing?! Stay tucked under the covers and still earn tons of resources! Level up easily and enjoy shared experience growth across your team. Who says you can’t get stronger while lying down?

【A Laid-back Life in Another World】
Gather resources, craft items, and build your very own home in another world. Sip a little wine, unwind after a long day, and enjoy the slow rhythm of fantasy life!

【Diverse Maps, Relaxed Adventures】
Do you love green meadows where the breeze gently brushes your face? Or would you rather wander along golden beaches, feeling the call of the waves? Maybe the unknown calls to you—mysterious caves, molten cores, or floating islands high above the clouds? Leave real-world worries behind and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Dreamland!

【Stress-free Social Fun at the Camp】
As the campfire crackles and the scent of grilled meat fills the air, lay out your picnic blanket and gather your friends! Try out some exotic delicacies from another world—ever wondered what dragon tail might taste like?

【Hands-Free Combat Anytime, Anywhere】
No complicated controls—just jump into battle with a single tap! Your team fights automatically with dazzling effects, letting you enjoy smooth and exciting combat wherever you are. Sit back, relax, and watch the show!

【Adorable Pets, Endless Variety】
Meet the Dreamies—your cute, fluffy, and loyal friends of all shapes and sizes! Perfect for traveling, exploring, and collecting resources, each Dreamie has unique abilities that boost your power and productivity. Who could resist building a whole nest of adorable companions?

apps.title: Meowdoku
apps.summary:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.
Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
💡 Simple Rules, Deep Strategy
The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!
✨ Key Features
🐾 Pure & Immersive Experience
- Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
- Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.
- Privacy Focused: We never track your data. We only care that you enjoy the game safely and securely.
📅 Daily Brain Teasers
- Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
- Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards.

apps.description:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.
Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
💡 Simple Rules, Deep Strategy
The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!
✨ Key Features
🐾 Pure & Immersive Experience

apps.title: Rainbow Six Mobile
apps.summary:
From the acclaimed Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six franchise, Rainbow Six Mobile is a competitive online tactical action shooter FPS built specifically for online mobile action. Engage in intense 5v5 multiplayer FPS matches inspired by Rainbow Six Siege’s iconic Attack vs. Defense gameplay. Alternate roles every round as you play Attacker or Defender in fast-paced online combat. Experience close-quarter shooter action where teamwork, positioning, and map knowledge make the difference. Choose from a roster of elite Operators from Rainbow Six Siege, each designed for action tactical team play with unique abilities and gadgets. Every map offers new strategic possibilities, demanding coordination, precision, and smart decisions.

Rainbow Six Mobile delivers a true FPS action shooter experience, adapted for mobile platforms.

MOBILE ADAPTATION – Rainbow Six Mobile has been developed and optimized for mobile devices, delivering smooth online gameplay, intuitive controls, and shorter 5v5 FPS matches. Customize your HUD, adjust controls to your playstyle, and jump into tactical combat anywhere, anytime. This mobile shooter supports responsive touch controls and controller compatibility for competitive action on the go.

RAINBOW SIX EXPERIENCE – Experience the authentic Rainbow Six Siege on mobile. Play on legendary maps such as Bank, Clubhouse, Border, Oregon, and Villa. Each map is designed for tactical team coordination and intense 5v5 online combat. Squad up with friends and players worldwide in thrilling multiplayer action FPS battles.

TACTICAL SHOOTER GAME – Rainbow Six Mobile, like Rainbow Six Siege, is an action-tactical shooter focused on realistic combat. Clear angles, gather intel with drones and cameras, and adapt your strategy to every map. Smart decisions, teamwork, and preparation are essential to dominate this online action FPS.

DESTRUCTIBLE ENVIRONMENTS – Use destruction to your advantage in close-quarter combat. Break walls, doors, and hatches to reshape the map and create new tactical opportunities. Every map becomes a dynamic battlefield where strategy and action collide in intense shooter gameplay.

STRATEGIC TEAM-BASED PVP – Strategy and teamwork are the keys to success in Rainbow Six Mobile. Adapt your strategy to each map, role, and situation in competitive 5v5 online combat. Attackers gather intel and breach defenses, while Defenders fortify positions and control the map. True tactical action shooter gameplay rewards communication and planning.

SPECIALIZED OPERATORS – Build your team with highly trained Operators from Rainbow Six Siege. Each Operator brings unique weapons, gadgets, and abilities to the battlefield. Mastering Operators is key to success in this competitive online shooter.

NEW MONTHLY SEASON – Every month, discover new action with fresh Operators, Battle Pass content, limited-time online modes, events, and cosmetics. Keep your team ready for evolving combat challenges across new and familiar maps.

This game requires an online connection (4G, 5G, or Wi-Fi).

apps.title: After Dark - Survival Tomb
apps.summary:
MIND THE MUMMY

Hello there, adventurer! Ready to explore ancient tombs and discover hidden treasures in this idle strategy game? Then grab your pickaxe, torch, and weapon, and start collecting materials, fighting scarabs, and exploring a vast network of dungeons filled with danger and loot. This adventure game blends RPG-style character building with survival elements as you face waves of desert creatures.

LIGHT THE FIRE OF ADVENTURE

Using your trusty pickaxe, smash your way through dungeon tunnels and mine materials — you’ll need them to upgrade your character and gear. Along the way, you’ll encounter all kinds of mummies, scarabs, and other threats that you must defeat to light the cauldrons at each level. Earn gold and unlock random skill upgrades. Choose wisely — your survival depends on how you invest your resources and adapt to the challenges ahead.

Fantastic features:

🔥 Character building – spend gold to upgrade your character and their abilities. Each run offers new upgrade choices, affecting your skills and how far you get.

🔥 Endless enemies – waves of creatures lurk in the dark. Defeat them to earn experience, gold, and skill upgrades. Manage your energy and timing to stay alive.

🔥 Idle mining – collect resources between fights and use them to improve weapons and gear. Upgrade your arsenal and prepare for the unknown lurking in the depths.

DANGEROUS DUNGEONS AWAIT

These dark tunnels weren’t made for the faint of heart. But you’re here to explore, gather loot, and push deeper. After Dark blends strategy and idle collection with tense survival action. Fight off enemies, grow stronger, and uncover what lies at the end of the tomb!

Privacy Policy: https://say.games/privacy-policy
Terms of Use: https://say.games/terms-of-use

apps.title: The Division Resurgence
apps.summary:
Become a Division agent, the last line of defense after society collapses.

Explore a shared open world set in New York City, featuring iconic locations and playable solo or fully in co-op.
Complete more than 100 world activities as you restore order and uncover an exclusive, canon storyline that reveals a plot threatening the entire city — and beyond. Loot, mod, and customize a wide variety of weapons and gear, along with skins and cosmetics, to build your perfect agent and grow stronger.

Customize your agent and choose a specialization that fits your playstyle — from tanky Bulwarks to high-firepower Demolitionists. Each specialization features unique skills and powerful ultimate abilities, letting you adapt your role at any time while unlocking new talents in your skill tree.

Protect civilians from dangerous factions, such as the Cleaners who want to burn everything down, or the Rikers driven by greed, as you fight back against the chaos spreading across the city.

Engage in intense PVE combat, competitive PVP modes, and enter the iconic Dark Zone PvPvE experience, where high-risk encounters lead to high-end rewards — if you can extract them.

The Division Resurgence is designed as a living game, with regular additional content expanding the story, the world, and the challenges ahead.

apps.title: Arrows Dash
apps.summary:
Welcome to Arrows Dash! A sleek yet captivating logic puzzle game that blends strategic thinking with soothing gameplay. It is designed to sharpen your mind while offering a peaceful escape from the hustle and bustle of daily life. More than just a casual pastime, Arrows Dash delivers a thoughtfully crafted gaming experience. Every move matters, every decision tests your foresight, and every puzzle solved brings a deeply satisfying sense of accomplishment. Whether you are a seasoned puzzle enthusiast in search of new challenges or a casual player looking for a relaxing way to keep your mind active, Arrows Dash invites you to dive into a world of minimalist design, ingenious mechanics, and endless logical fun.
At its core, Arrows Dash features a deceptively simple rule set: tap and swipe the arrows to move them along their designated directions, and guide all arrows off the grid. Yet do not be fooled by its straightforward appearance. What starts out as an effortless task will soon evolve into a true strategic challenge. A single misstep can trap your arrows, forcing you to rethink your approach and plan every move with precision. Unlike fast-paced action games that demand quick reflexes, this game features a stress-free, timer-free design. Play at your own pace, experiment with different strategies, and savor the calming journey of solving each puzzle.
Our team has poured passion into crafting over 3,000 meticulously designed levels. Each stage is tailored to challenge your logical reasoning, spatial awareness and critical thinking without overwhelming pressure. The game boasts a smooth, intuitive difficulty curve: begin with basic grids featuring only a single arrow to clear, then gradually progress to intricate layouts filled with multi-directional arrows, tricky pathways and cleverly placed obstacles that push your strategic skills to the limit. Every level is entirely unique — no random generation, no repetitive patterns — ensuring every puzzle feels fresh, fair and rewarding. As you advance to higher difficulties, you will navigate expansive grids that stretch beyond a single screen. Drag to explore the full map, adding extra depth and dimension to your puzzle-solving adventure.

apps.title: Dice Tac Toe
apps.summary:
Tic Tac Toe evolved! Roll the dice, pick your spot, and outsmart your rivals.

Think you know Tic Tac Toe? Think again.

Dice-Tac-Toe takes the world’s most famous game and injects it with a high-stakes tactical twist. This isn’t just about making a line; it’s about managing luck, calculating risk, and mastering the roll of the dice.

Step onto the massive 6x6 grid and prepare for a battle where every move is a decision and every roll could change the game.

The Classic Game, Reimagined

Forget the 3x3 grid. In Dice-Tac-Toe, the board is bigger, the stakes are higher, and the strategy is deeper. You don't just place your mark—you ROLL for it.

Why You’ll Love Dice-Tac-Toe:
- Strategy Meets Luck: Roll two dice to determine your coordinates. Do you take the safe spot or Re-roll for a game-changing play?
- Deep Tactical Gameplay: Use the 6x6 grid to block your opponent, set up massive combos, and score multiple points in a single turn.
- Unique Power-Ups: Not happy with your roll? Use Re-rolls to turn a "Bust" into a victory.
- Meet Sophie: Let your pro guide, Sophie, show you the ropes before you head into competitive play.
- Compete & Conquer: Face off in fast-paced matches where the first to score 3 wins the glory.
- Progresion & Rewards: Level up, earn gems, and unlock exclusive content as you climb the ranks.

How to Play:
- Roll: Shake the dice to get your Row and Column numbers.
- Target: Find the intersection on the grid.
- Score: Complete a line of 3 to score a point.
- Win: Outmaneuver your opponent and be the first to reach 3 points!

Luck gives you the numbers. Strategy gives you the win.

Whether you’re a fan of classic board games or looking for a fresh puzzle challenge, Dice-Tac-Toe delivers endless replayability.

Roll the dice. Claim the grid. Download Dice-Tac-Toe today!

apps.title: Frontier City
apps.summary:
After a cataclysmic nuclear war, clouds of radiation forever cover the skies of the wastelands.

You are the last light of humankind, and the mayor of a city of survivors. Outside, millions upon millions of zombies mutated by radiation and ever hungry roam in hordes, constantly seeking to devour the life within the city's walls. Inside are the terrified and weary survivors who have placed their last hopes on your leadership. Resources are scarce, dangers close on all sides, and the orders of old has toppled.

You must build high walls, give light to the city, and build a home over the despair, rebooting civilization amidst the ruins.

Will this city become humanity's ark? Or will it become its grave? Only you have the answer.

Wasteland Construction
In a resource scarce and desperate world, plan and build houses and farms, and electric and hydro facilities, maintaining the hope and lives of the survivors.

Desperate Defenses
Build sturdy city walls and defensive systems, deploy elite troops and withstand the endless tide of raging mutants.

Explore the Unknown
Send armies to explore wastelands encircled by danger, seeking precious supplies, deciphering the ruins, and unravelling plot upon plot, of how the world came to its end.

Conflicting Factions
Build Alliances with other player cities, or launch wars to seize rare resources. On these vile wastes, cooperation and betrayal are eternal themes.

apps.title: Pixel Blast: Robot Shooter
apps.summary:
THE FACTORY IS RUNNING. YOUR ROBOTS ARE READY.

Welcome to Pixel Blast — a color puzzle shooter built around one brutal, satisfying loop: deploy factory robots, blast matching pixel cubes off the assembly grid, and clear the board before the line jams.

Your bots don't mess around. They're loaded, color-coded, and ready to fire.

── HOW IT WORKS ──

Your robot shooters wait in the factory bay — each one armed with its own color charge. Launch a bot onto the conveyor and it automatically blasts every matching pixel cube in its path. The board is a grid of colored blocks. Your robots are the solution.

Manage the queue. Time your deployments. Chain your shots to demolish entire color zones at once.

One wrong sequence jams the machine. Five robots in the bay. One conveyor. Thousands of combinations.

Simple to pick up. Hard to put down.

── FEATURES ──

🤖 Factory robot shooters — Each bot is color-coded, locked, and ready to fire

⚙️ Conveyor line system — Queue your robots, control the order, clear the grid

🎯 Precision color blasting — Robots only fire at their matching color — every shot is intentional

⚡ One-tap controls — Deploy, aim, and blast with a single tap

🏭 Thousands of levels — Every stage is a new factory puzzle to dismantle block by block

💥 Chain reactions — Clear one color zone and watch the cascade wipe the board clean

🔩 No timers, no rush — Strategy and precision beat speed every time

── THE CHALLENGE ──

Early shifts are straightforward — the grid is manageable, the colors are few. Push further and the assembly boards grow wider, the color combos get denser, and the conveyor margin for error shrinks to nothing.

Every level is an engineering problem. Analyze the board. Sequence your bots correctly. Execute the perfect run.

Master the factory. Master the blast.

── MADE FOR ──

✔ Quick sessions — one grid, one clear, one win

✔ Fans of color-match and cube puzzle games

✔ Players who love watching a chaotic board go completely clean

✔ Anyone who wants satisfying one-tap action without the noise

Pixel Blast is free to download and play. No Wi-Fi required. Short sessions, maximum payoff.

🏭 Report for duty. Blast away. Leave no cube standing.

apps.title: Cross World: Word Riddles
apps.developer: Quiz & Trivia Games by Mno Go Apps
apps.summary:
Welcome to Cross World - a modern take on crossword trivia games!
If you love solving puzzles, testing your knowledge, and training your brain with word games, this app is made for you. Cross World combines the classic crossword puzzle format with exciting trivia quiz questions, creating a unique challenge you won’t find anywhere else.

What makes Cross World different?
Unlike traditional crossword apps, every clue in Cross World is a trivia question. To fill in the grid, you don’t just guess words - you prove your knowledge across history, science, movies, sports, geography, and more. It’s the perfect mix of a quiz game and a word puzzle adventure.

Why you’ll love it:
- Thousands of clever trivia questions designed to challenge your memory and logic.
- A mix of text + picture questions that make every puzzle unique.
- Crosswords that grow more fun and rewarding with every solved riddle.
- A brain teaser experience that’s relaxing yet stimulating.
- The option to use clues when puzzles get tricky.
- A colorful, friendly interface for enjoyable play anytime.
- Earn stars and coins as you play and unlock levels.
- Daily crossword challenges to keep your mind sharp.

Boost your brainpower & vocabulary
Cross World is more than just a word game. It’s a daily habit to train your brain, expand your general knowledge, and enrich your vocabulary while having fun. Every crossword is a chance to learn something surprising!

Travel the world of words
From quick mini-puzzles to big challenges, every level is a journey. Solve word riddles, unlock achievements, and see how far your knowledge takes you.

Get started today!
Dive into the ultimate mix of crosswords and trivia quizzes. Whether you play for relaxation, education, or a competitive challenge, you’ll always find something exciting here.

Cross World is the smart way to have fun!

apps.title: Safari Universe
apps.summary:
If you are looking for the ultimate safari games with beast hunting, then you must definitely try Safari Universe: Lion Games! This is an unrivaled animal life simulator in the savanna with elements of beast hunting. Immerse yourself in the animal life simulator to the fullest and feel like a real wild cat in this representative of safari games.

Start as a lion cat, hunt, improve your characteristics, raise a family, and become a king of the beasts! Every minute of this beast hunting takes you to the expanses of wildlife with its vast living world.

Download Safari Universe: Lion Games right now and demonstrate your beast hunting skills, as well as live your best wildlife in the savannah full of adventures!

🐾

ANIMAL LIFE SIMULATOR


Start your journey in safari games playing as a lion cat, go on hunt for savanna animals to satisfy your hunger and evolve. Bring prey to your den and grow into a more powerful big cat.

⭐

COMPLETE TASKS


Get and complete wildlife quests to evolve faster and more interestingly. Experience the unique experience of lion games along with interesting challenges that give a sense of constant progress.

🦁

FUN LION HUNT


Use your animal hunting skills to defeat even the largest inhabitants of the savanna. Lion games have never been with so many wild beasts.

🧭

EXPLORE THE SAVANNA


Safari Universe: Lion Games has a huge territory with all kinds of savanna animals. Live the life of a wild cat in a realistic animal life simulator.

⚡

UPGRADE SKILLS


The more meat you hunt, the stronger you can become in this beast hunting. Upgrade the strength of your bite, claws, attack speed, running speed, and more.

📖

EXPAND THE BESTIARY


Following the example of the best safari games, the living world of our animal life simulator is full of various savanna animals. Each new creature you hunt will be recorded in the bestiary, hunt them all!

🐆

RAISE YOUR PRIDE


Rescue and raise various wild cats that will join your family and help you hunt even more effectively. Lion cat, panther, jaguar, tiger, cheetah and other felines can become part of your family.

🦍

BOSS FIGHTS


Use all the power of your pride in battles against dangerous bosses, among which there may even be mythical creatures. Bosses like those in Safari Universe: Animal Life Simulator have never been seen in lion games, accept the challenge and become the king of the beasts.

🐅

COLLECT RARE CATS


Find animal boxes, open them for earned resources, and get a guaranteed wild cat to join your family. A rare tiger, an epic lynx, a legendary panther, a mythical jaguar, and many other amazing beasts are waiting for you.

Explore vast lands, improve your strength, and experience the thrill of the hunt in one of the most exciting safari games where every decision shapes your journey. Survive in the wild, go to powerful beast hunting, and grow your pride in a living ecosystem full of savanna animals.

Safari Universe is a dynamic presence of lion games where you rise from a lone predator to the king of the wild. Build your pride, expand your territory, and dominate the savanna in one of the most immersive safari games and unforgettable lion hunt simulator.

apps.title: Urban Lore:Doppelganger Street
apps.summary:
!Two people, but only one is real!
!Ask, observe, and doubt!
Players ask a variety of questions and compare the answers and reactions of the two figures. The same question, different answers. Awkward speech. Slightly mismatched memories. An unexplainable sense of unease. All of these are clues.
!Your choices reveal the truth!
Questions are limited, and you cannot ask everything. Choose your questions carefully and find the fake.
!Game Features!
A unique deduction system that compares two characters side by side
Interrogation gameplay based on question selection
A psychological game focused on noticing subtle differences
UI optimized for horizontal mobile screens
An immersive atmosphere filled with tension

Every choice becomes a clue, and every judgment leads to a result.
Now, uncover the real one.

apps.title: Rap Star:Idle Clicker
apps.summary:
From streets to stardom — tap, rap, earn, date, collect. Rap Star: Idle Clicker is a rap life simulator meets idle tycoon. Start with $1 and build your rap empire. Every tap rewrites your destiny.
TAP TO RAP, STACK CASH
Every tap is money. From freestyling on corners to sold-out stadiums, your rap career starts from zero. Invest in studios, unlock new flows, hire producers. Even offline, your hustle never stops.
FROM BROKE TO BILLIONAIRE
A busted car with no AC and one dollar. That's all you start with. But the finish line is a penthouse, a private jet, and an island with your name on it. Upgrade your crib, car, clothes, studio — watch your world transform from ruins to empire. Not a fairy tale. A real, brick-by-brick come-up.
BUILD YOUR MUSIC EMPIRE
More than making songs — build an empire. Own a record label, launch fashion lines, sign rising stars. Drop singles that break the internet, top the charts, become a cultural icon. Every choice shapes your legend.
MINI-GAMES THAT KEEP YOU HOOKED
Your rap career isn't just tapping — addictive mini-games pop up throughout your rise. The faster your fingers, the faster your fame.
ROMANCE — STARS ARE NEVER ALONE
When you reach the top, the women follow. They're not accessories — each one has her own story, her own temper, her own world.
Take her somewhere romantic and watch her melt. Take her somewhere ridiculous and watch her flip. Give her a cheap little gift to make her smile, or drop serious cash on luxury and watch her scream. Get to know her past and enter her heart, or keep your distance and enjoy the tension.
Every woman treats you differently. Every relationship goes where you take it. Loyal or player? Deep love or just a fling? This is your life. Nobody chooses for you.
COLLECT — DEFINE YOUR IDENTITY THROUGH TASTE
Every rap legend has a collection. Kicks, vinyl, skateboards, diamond grillz — these aren't just items. They're symbols of rap culture. Symbols of who you are.
Open the vault. Pull legendary pieces. Every item makes you stronger, and completing certain combos unlocks hidden stories — about the deepest secrets in the industry.
Your collection isn't just trophies in a display case. It's proof of the roads you've walked, the money you've earned, the life you've lived.
IMMERSIVE STORY
Comic-style dialogue with branching choices that affect the outcome. Every decision changes your path, your reputation, and your ending.
PK BATTLES
PK battles in your hood. Upgrade faster to win. Defend your block. Earn respect.
FEATURES
• Idle clicker core — Tap to earn. Offline earnings never stop.
• Life simulation — Relationships, reputation, fame. Experience the ups and downs.
• Full come-up — From $1 to billionaire. Upgrade everything.
• Multiple unique girlfriends — Every relationship has depth. Every woman has attitude.
• Legendary collectibles — Totems of rap culture. Proof of your taste and identity.
• Music tycoon — Studios, labels, business empire.
• Addictive mini-games — Tap challenges for bonus rewards.
• Go viral — Top charts. Become an icon.
• Immersive story — Branching choices change your fate.
• PK battles — Compete with rivals. Win respect.
• Hip hop culture — From underground to stadiums.
• Endless upgrades — Cribs, cars, clothes, studios. Everything levels up.
YOUR LEGEND STARTS NOW
No handouts. No shortcuts. Just a mic and a dream. Pick it up. The world is waiting.

apps.title: Chaos Drink Sort
apps.summary:
Welcome to Chaos Drink Sort, a fresh twist on classic sorting puzzles. Pour colorful drinks, solve clever challenges, and watch bottles transform into boxes as you bring order to chaos. Simple to start, surprisingly deep to master.

How To Play
- Tap a bottle to pour its top drink into another bottle.
- You can only pour when colors match, and there’s enough space.
- Once a bottle is perfectly sorted, it transforms into a box
- Clear all to solve these puzzles

Unique Features
- Bottle-to-box transformation for strategic gameplay
- Satisfying drink-pouring animations and effects
- Hundreds of handcrafted levels with rising difficulty
- Easy one-tap controls, brain-teasing solutions
- Relaxing yet challenging — play at your own pace

Chaos Drink Sort is more than a sorting game — it’s a puzzle of planning and transformation. Think ahead, trigger smart bottle-to-box conversions, and enjoy the satisfaction of turning chaos into perfect order

apps.title: Racing Master
apps.summary:
Racing Master is a high-quality racing game developed in collaboration with CODEMASTERS®. It features over 100 officially licensed iconic vehicles that players can customize, allowing them to compete in thrilling races set in cities and renowned circuits around the world. With realistic visuals and engine sounds, you can experience an immersive atmosphere that feels just like the real thing, while also enjoying fierce real-time competition with other players.

——————————————
Key Features of Racing Master
1. Authentic Vehicles
Racing Master boasts over 120 officially licensed vehicles from more than 30 prestigious brands. Each car is intricately modeled using advanced real-time lighting technology, ensuring every detail shines. Get behind the wheel of legendary machines like the Lamborghini Aventador SVJ (LB834) '19 and ignite your passion for racing!
2. Deep Customization
Make your vehicles truly yours with a myriad of customization options, including colors, liveries, decals, tires, rims, suspension settings, brakes, and authentic aftermarket parts.
3. Global Tracks
Experience the thrill of racing on real-world scanned tracks and circuits, featuring iconic locations such as Chicago, San Francisco, Barcelona, Sicily, Amsterdam, and the Alps. You'll also race on famous real-world F1 circuits, including Shanghai International Circuit, Indianapolis, and Red Bull Ring! Each track presents unique driving challenges.
4. Competitive Racing
Our advanced physics engine accurately simulates various drive systems and low-speed ignition characteristics. Compete in exhilarating PvP matches, GvG battles, and intense racing tournaments.
5. Immersive Audio
Feel the rush with meticulously recorded vehicle sounds that capture the distinct nuances of engine notes, exhaust systems, transmissions, suspensions, and aerodynamics.

——————————————
For more information about Racing Master, visit:
· Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Racingmasterofficial
· Discord: https://discord.gg/9SbzjsxFVb

apps.title: BALL x PIT
apps.summary:
BALL x PIT is a brick-breaking, ball-fusing, base-building survival roguelite. Batter hordes of enemies with ricocheting balls and gather the riches of the pit to expand your homestead, generate resources and recruit unique heroes.

BALL x PIT is a fast-paced fantasy roguelite where heroes must find the balls to plunge deeper into a seemingly bottomless pit of monsters. Develop arcane ammunition and resources in pursuit of treasure, recruiting additional heroes to aid you in your perilous quest.

Ballbylon has fallen. After a meteoric and completely unexpected event annihilated the great city, all that remains is an ominous, yawning pit. Treasure hunters from far and wide flock to the city’s tomb to seek their fortune, plumbing the depths in search of Ballbylon’s scattered riches. Few return.

The pit plays host to armies of barbaric creatures, hellbent on ending your quest before it even begins. Armed with a growing arsenal of magic-infused projectiles, batter your way through multiple levels of increasingly challenging obstacles to claim the ultimate prizes and rebuild New Ballbylon.

Fuse Your Balls
The Ball Fusion system encourages explosive experimentation with over 60 randomized balls to equip and combine during your journey. Discover overpowered combinations and unexpected synergies from hundreds of possible outcomes.

Build New Ballbylon
Expand New Ballbylon with over 70 unique buildings that provide gameplay bonuses and unlock further power-ups, new characters, and more! As your community grows, task homebound heroes with automated tasks to keep the resources coming while you dive deeper into the pit.

Discover New Realms
Face legions of diverse enemies within the pit, battling through barren deserts, frozen caverns, savage forests and more. Each region offers its own unique set of hazards on top of hordes of increasingly challenging foes and mighty, screen-filling bosses.

Recruit Fellow Hunters
As you explore the pit you’ll encounter fellow treasure hunters eager to add their skills to your expedition. Each character has unique, upgradable mechanics that totally change the way you play the game. Experimentation and adaptation are crucial to the success of New Ballbylon!

apps.title: Arrow Maze-Tap Away
apps.summary:
Welcome to Arrow Maze-Tap Away : Logic's Solution Domain, a minimalist puzzle game that tests your planning and foresight. Your goal is simple and clear: safely extract all the arrows. However, every move must be precise, or the entire board will be thrown into chaos.
Core Features:
Step-by-Step Logical Challenges: Every move is crucial. You'll need to anticipate the paths of all the arrows, carefully plan their extraction order, and find the one and only path to order amidst the chaos.

Massive Handcrafted Puzzles: The game features thousands of levels meticulously polished by designers. With a smooth, progressive difficulty curve—from introductory guides to mind-bending challenges—it will challenge your intellectual limits step by step.

Minimalist Vision, Ultimate Focus: Free from all distractions, the clean and restrained visual style allows you to immerse yourself completely in the world of thought, focusing on the structure and logic of the puzzle itself.
A Stress-Free Space for Contemplation: No time limits, no score penalties. You can pause at any time to rehearse different strategies and enjoy the pure joy of solving complex problems at a relaxed pace.
Thoughtful Hint System: When your thoughts hit a dead end, the built-in hint system will light a lamp for you, providing just the right amount of guidance to help you break through bottlenecks.
Are you ready? Within the confines of the grid, use your wisdom to carve a path of escape for all the arrows—free from conflict.

apps.title: Calm Solitaire: Classic Card
apps.summary:
Step into a world of tranquil card play with Calm Solitaire. This is the classic Solitaire you know, reimagined as a peaceful retreat for your mind. Designed with soothing visuals, relaxing interactions, and a stress-free environment, it’s the perfect way to unwind, focus, and enjoy a moment for yourself. Fully playable offline and tailored for every screen.

A Truly Peaceful Experience
• Easy on the Eyes: Enjoy carefully designed, large cards, clear fonts, and soft, calming color themes that make every game session a visual comfort.
• Faithful and Pure: We’ve kept the classic Klondike rules intact, free from distracting ads or cluttered layouts. It’s just you and the cards.
• Mindful Mental Exercise: Perfect for daily brain training. Quietly enhance your memory, strategic thinking, and patience as you play and decompress.
• Effortless Interaction: A clean, intuitive interface makes moving cards with a tap or drag beautifully smooth and completely natural.

Simple Rules, Deep Satisfaction
• Build your foundation stacks in descending order from King to Ace, alternating between red and black suits.
• Choose your pace with Peaceful Mode (Draw 1) or Thoughtful Mode (Draw 3).
• Take your time. Use unlimited undo & hints to work through each layout at your own rhythm.

Features Designed for Serenity
• Daily Moments of Peace: Unwind with a new, unique challenge every day. Track your progress and collect serene-themed badges.
• Personalize Your Peace: Create your ideal calming atmosphere with a selection of elegant card styles and tranquil background themes.
• Your Offline Sanctuary: No internet? No problem. Your calm escape is always with you—on a plane, during a commute, or in your favorite chair.
• Comfortably Inclusive: Thoughtfully designed with left-hand mode, high-contrast options, and clear, readable text for all players.
• Seamless on Any Device: Experience perfect gameplay on smartphones, tablets, and foldables of any size.
• Evolving Tranquility: Look forward to regular updates that bring fresh, calming themes and new ways to play to your collection.

Find Your Focus with Every Deal
Whether you're seeking a nostalgic pastime or a new ritual for mental wellness, Calm Solitaire turns a spare minute into a rewarding opportunity for focus and calm.

Download our Calm Solitaire Now and Embrace the Peace!

Billions of players can’t be wrong - run and jump back into the beloved world of Subway Surfers and rediscover your favorite endless running adventure with exciting new twists. Progress through fresh hurdles, reach new heights, and collect new characters!

Jake, Tricky, Fresh, and Yutani are ready - are you? Play Subway Surfers City now!

- CHOOSE YOUR ADVENTURE: Switch seamlessly between thrilling endless runs chasing a new high score, or playing the all new City Tour!

apps.title: Arrow Rescue: Save the Animal
apps.summary:
The maze is full of danger… and only you can save them! 🐾
Arrow Rescue: Save the Animal is a satisfying arrow puzzle game where strategy meets heartwarming animal rescue. Clear the right arrows, open the correct paths, and guide every trapped animal safely out of the maze!
Simple to play, challenging to master — every move matters.

🧠 Think Smart, Move Smart
Each level is a carefully designed arrow puzzle.
Tap arrows in the correct order to clear the maze and create a safe escape route.
But be careful — one wrong move can block the path!
As you progress, puzzles become more complex, requiring logic, timing, and strategic thinking. There’s no rush, so take your time and plan the perfect solution.

🐶 Rescue Adorable Animals
Cute animals are trapped inside tricky mazes — and they’re counting on you!
Save puppies, kittens, bunnies, and many more lovable creatures. Each rescue brings a satisfying feeling of accomplishment and unlocks new exciting challenges.
Your mission: clear the arrows, open the way, and set them free!

🎯 Simple Controls, Deep Strategy
• Tap to remove arrows
• Clear paths in the right sequence
• Avoid blocking your own route
• Solve increasingly challenging maze puzzles
• Relaxing yet brain-teasing gameplay
Easy to learn, but every level will test your logic skills.

🌟 Why You’ll Love Arrow Rescue
✨ Hundreds of unique levels
✨ No time pressure — play at your own pace
✨ Satisfying arrow-clearing mechanics
✨ Cute animal rescue theme
✨ Smooth animations and vibrant visuals
✨ Perfect balance of relaxation and challenge
Whether you love brain puzzles, maze games, or satisfying tap mechanics, Arrow Rescue: Save the Animal will keep you hooked.

Are you ready to think ahead, clear the arrows, and save them all? 🐾
Download now and start the rescue mission! 🚀

apps.title: Hatch Dragons
apps.summary:
Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

Long ago, Dragons filled this enchanted forest, thriving alongside nature. Each evolved into forms as diverse as the surrounding flora and fauna. Some shimmered with glittering scales, others were soft and furry, and some even bloomed with flowers or mushrooms.

When nearby mining drove the Dragons away, fog crept in and the forest fell silent for years. Now, join Liv the Elf to lift the fog, summon the Dragons home, and help the forest sparkle with life once more.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

*****
Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.
This game is free to play but does contain in-app purchases. If you run into any issues while playing or you have any suggestions, please reach out to us at support@runaway.zendesk.com

apps.title: Can Jam:Box Match
apps.summary:
Ready to organize the containers? Dive into this fizzy puzzle where your goal is to pack every drink into its matching box!

🌟How to Play
Tap to Pack: Click drinks on the counter to send them to the box that matches their color.
Fill the Boxes: Once a box is full, it’s sealed and shipped to make room for the next one. Clear the entire shelf to win!
Manage Your Slots: Keep a close eye on the waiting area! Arrange your drinks strategically so you don't run out of space in a total "Can Jam."

🌟Game Features
Thirst-Quenching Challenges: Explore hundreds of vibrant levels filled with colorful cans, bottles, and sodas that get trickier as you play.
Satisfying ASMR Sorting: Enjoy the crisp "pop" and "clink" sounds as you untangle the mess and pack everything perfectly.
Smart & Refreshing: A perfect blend of casual fun and brain-teasing strategy to keep your mind sharp and relaxed.
